subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the love of God in this Most Great Cycle and in this age and era of the dawning of the Luminary of the Supreme Realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار محبه الله در این کور اعظم و عهد و عصر اشراق نیر عالم اعلی که
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
